title: The foreach Loop
description: Iterate over arrays and objects easily.

slides.title: foreach: Designed for Arrays
foreach with Indexed Array
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$colors = ["red", "green", "blue"];

foreach ($colors as $color) {
    echo $color . "\n";
}

foreach ($colors as $index => $color) {
    echo "$index: $color\n";
}
?>

slides.title: foreach with Associative Array
Modifying Array Values

quizData.explanation: Prints 'a', then 'b', then break stops the loop.
